description: Task breakdown for implementing missing metrics calculation steps using Yahoo Finance API

subtasks.title: Create PriceHistory MongoDB Model
subtasks.description: Create Mongoose model for storing daily price data

subtasks.title: Create Yahoo Finance Client Utility
subtasks.description: Create utility module for fetching prices from Yahoo Finance API
features: Fetch historical daily prices for a symbol and date range
Cache results to avoid redundant API calls

subtasks.title: Create updatePriceData.js Script
subtasks.description: Script to fetch and store price data for all symbols in EquitiesWeightTimeseries
logic: Query EquitiesWeightTimeseries to get all unique (symbol, date) pairs
Group by symbol and determine date range needed
For each symbol, check PriceHistory collection for existing data
Fetch missing prices from Yahoo Finance API using yahooFinanceClient.js
Handle missing data (forward fill, mark as degraded, or skip)
Upsert prices into PriceHistory MongoDB collection
Process in batches to avoid memory issues
Return summary: { totalSymbols, processed, skipped, newPrices, errors }
subtasks.databaseStorage: YES - All prices stored in PriceHistory collection with compound unique index on (symbol, date)

options.userId: Optional: process only this user's symbols
options.accountId: Optional: process only this account's symbols
options.forceRefresh: Optional: re-fetch even if price exists
options.fullSync: Boolean: if true, fetch all historical prices; if false, only fetch missing dates (default: false)

incrementalLogic: If fullSync=false: Query PriceHistory to find last price date per symbol
Only fetch prices for dates after last price date
If fullSync=true: Fetch all prices from first position date to present
Upsert all fetched prices into PriceHistory collection

subtasks.title: Add Rate Limiting and Error Handling
subtasks.description: Implement rate limiting for Yahoo Finance API and robust error handling
features: Rate limiting: max 2000 requests/hour (Yahoo Finance limit)
Log missing symbols for manual review
Continue processing other symbols on error

subtasks.title: Test Price Enrichment
subtasks.description: Test the price fetching functionality
testCases: Verify data is stored correctly in PriceHistory
Test incremental updates (only fetch missing dates)

subtasks.title: Create PortfolioTimeseries MongoDB Model
subtasks.description: Create Mongoose model for storing daily portfolio valuation

positions: Array of { symbol, units, price, value } (optional)

subtasks.title: Implement Stock Value Calculation
subtasks.description: Calculate daily stock value from positions and prices
logic: For each account and date:
- Query EquitiesWeightTimeseries for all positions
- Join with PriceHistory to get prices
- Calculate: stockValue = sum(units * price) for all symbols
- Handle missing prices (forward fill last known price)
- Store position breakdown in positions array

subtasks.title: Implement Cash Value Calculation
subtasks.description: Build cash flow series from account activities
logic: Process activities of type: DIVIDEND, INTEREST, CONTRIBUTION, WITHDRAWAL, FEE
Build cash flow series:
- Start with initial balance (if available) or 0
- For each day: cashValue[t] = cashValue[t-1] + dividends + interest - fees + contributions - withdrawals
Handle multiple accounts separately
Track external flows (CONTRIBUTION, WITHDRAWAL) separately

subtasks.title: Create updatePortfolioTimeseries.js Script
subtasks.description: Main script to build portfolio valuation timeseries

options.userId: Optional: process only this user's accounts
options.fullSync: Boolean: if true, process all historical data; if false, only process from last PortfolioTimeseries date (default: false)

incrementalLogic: If fullSync=false: Query PortfolioTimeseries to find last date per account
Only process dates after last PortfolioTimeseries date
If fullSync=true: Process all dates from first EquitiesWeightTimeseries entry to present
Upsert all calculated values into PortfolioTimeseries collection
process: 1. Get all accounts from EquitiesWeightTimeseries collection
a. Calculate stock value per day (Step 8.2) - reads from EquitiesWeightTimeseries and PriceHistory
b. Calculate cash value per day (Step 8.3) - reads from AccountActivities
e. Upsert into PortfolioTimeseries MongoDB collection
subtasks.databaseStorage: YES - All portfolio valuations stored in PortfolioTimeseries collection with compound unique index on (userId, accountId, date)

subtasks.title: Handle Edge Cases
subtasks.description: Handle edge cases in valuation calculation
cases: Missing prices: forward fill last known price
Missing cash activities: cashValue = 0 or carry forward

subtasks.title: Extend PortfolioTimeseries Model
subtasks.description: Add return and index fields to PortfolioTimeseries model
fields: cumReturn: Number (cumulative return per active segment)
equityIndex: Number (normalized equity curve, starts at 1 per segment)

subtasks.title: Implement Simple Returns Calculation
subtasks.description: Calculate flow-adjusted daily returns
logic: For each date in PortfolioTimeseries:
- Get totalValue[t] and totalValue[t-1]
- Get depositWithdrawal[t]
- Calculate return using formula
- If denominator <= 0, set return to 0
- Store in simpleReturns field

subtasks.title: Implement Active Segments Logic
subtasks.description: Identify periods where portfolio has non-trivial value
logic: Define threshold (e.g., totalValue > 1e-3)
Identify alive segments: periods where totalValue > threshold
Segment starts when value goes from 0 to > threshold
Dead periods: value = 0 or < threshold
Assign segment ID to each date

subtasks.title: Implement Cumulative Return Calculation
subtasks.description: Calculate cumulative return per active segment
logic: For each alive segment separately:
- Start with cumReturn = 0 at segment start
- For each day: cumReturn[t] = (1 + simpleReturns[t]) * (1 + cumReturn[t-1]) - 1
For dead periods: carry last value forward (or set to 0)

subtasks.title: Implement Equity Index Calculation
subtasks.description: Calculate normalized equity curve per segment
logic: For each alive segment separately:
- Start with equityIndex = 1 at segment start
- For each day: equityIndex[t] = (1 + simpleReturns[t]) * equityIndex[t-1]
For dead periods: set to NaN (so charts show gaps)

subtasks.title: Update updatePortfolioTimeseries.js
subtasks.description: Add returns calculation to portfolio timeseries script
changes: After calculating totalValue, calculate simpleReturns
Identify active segments
Calculate cumReturn and equityIndex per segment
Update PortfolioTimeseries MongoDB records with new fields (simpleReturns, cumReturn, equityIndex)
subtasks.databaseStorage: YES - Returns and indices stored in existing PortfolioTimeseries collection records

subtasks.title: Review and Plan Metrics Model Updates
subtasks.description: Review existing Metrics model and plan schema updates
migrationStrategy: Keep existing fields for backward compatibility
Add new fields alongside existing ones
Gradually migrate data to new structure
Update indexes to support new query patterns
indexes: { userId: 1, accountId: 1, date: 1, period: 1 } (unique compound index) - NEW
{ asOfDate: 1, accountId: 1 } (existing, keep for backward compatibility)

subtasks.title: Create Calculation Utility Functions
subtasks.description: Break out calculation functions into organized utility files

files.description: Portfolio snapshot metrics (AUM, allocation, HHI, income)
Risk metrics (volatility, beta, drawdown, VaR, CVaR)

subtasks.databaseStorage: All calculated values stored in Metrics collection via calculateMetrics.js

subtasks.title: Create calculateMetrics.js Script
subtasks.description: Main script that orchestrates metric calculations and stores results in DB
imports: Import all helper functions from metrics/helper/*.js
process: a. Filter PortfolioTimeseries to period range
b. Call helper functions to calculate all metrics:
c. Build metrics object with all calculated values
4. Return summary: { totalPeriods, calculated, stored, errors }
subtasks.databaseStorage: YES - All metrics stored in Metrics collection with compound index on (userId, accountId, date, period)

subtasks.title: Update Metrics Model Schema
subtasks.description: Extend existing Metrics model to support new metrics structure
changes: Add userId field (required, indexed)
Add period field (required: '1M', '3M', 'YTD', '1Y', 'ITD')
Add metrics object with all calculated metrics
Update compound index to: { userId: 1, accountId: 1, date: 1, period: 1 }
Keep existing fields for backward compatibility
Add new fields: totalReturn, cagr, sortino, maxDrawdown, var95, cvar95, hhi, diversificationScore, dividendIncome, interestIncome, totalIncomeYield
subtasks.databaseStorage: YES - Model defines schema for Metrics collection storage

subtasks.title: Update metricsController.js
subtasks.description: Replace placeholder implementations with real calculations
changes: Replace AccountHoldings queries with PortfolioTimeseries queries
Remove hardcoded values (beta: 0.94, factor exposures)
Query Metrics collection for pre-computed metrics
Or calculate on-the-fly from PortfolioTimeseries if not pre-computed
Update all calculation methods to use real data

subtasks.title: Create Validation Checks
subtasks.description: Implement data quality validation checks
checks: AUM Sanity: Portfolio value within expected range (not negative, not unreasonably large)
Missing Prices: Count of symbols with missing price data
Data Gaps: Identify date ranges with missing portfolio values
Return Outliers: Flag returns > 100% or < -100% (may indicate data error)
Consistency: Verify totalValue = stockValue + cashValue for all dates
Position Consistency: Verify positions match activities (sum of signed units)

subtasks.title: Implement Alert System
subtasks.description: Log warnings/errors and optionally send notifications
features: Store validation results in database (optional) - new ValidationResults collection
subtasks.databaseStorage: OPTIONAL - Validation results can be stored in ValidationResults collection for audit trail

subtasks.title: Create validateMetrics.js Script
subtasks.description: Main validation script

subtasks.title: Update Cron Job for Daily Refresh
subtasks.description: Update cron job to run all new scripts in sequence with incremental updates
errorHandling: Continue to next step even if previous step has errors
Send alert if critical step fails

subtasks.title: Create Full Sync Function for New Connections
subtasks.description: Create function to run full historical pipeline when new brokerage connection is created
subtasks.trigger: Called when new SnapTrade connection is established
sequence: 1. updateActivitiesTable.js with fullSync=true (fetch all historical activities)
3. updatePriceData.js with fullSync=true (fetch all historical prices)
4. updatePortfolioTimeseries.js with fullSync=true (calculate all historical values)
integration: Call from connectionsController.js after new connection is created
Call from Settings.jsx after detecting new connection (fullSync: true)
Pass userId and accountId(s) for the new connection

subtasks.title: Create Main Pipeline Script
subtasks.description: Create a single script that runs all steps in sequence with fullSync support

options.fullSync: Boolean: if true, full historical sync; if false, incremental (default: false)
options.steps: Optional: array of steps to run

features: Support both fullSync=true (new connections) and fullSync=false (incremental refresh)
usage: Full sync: runMetricsPipeline({ fullSync: true, userId, accountId })

subtasks.title: Add API Endpoint for Manual Trigger
subtasks.description: Add endpoint to manually trigger metrics calculation (incremental by default)

body.fullSync: Boolean: if true, full historical sync; if false, incremental from last date (default: false)
body.steps: Optional: array of steps to run ['price', 'valuation', 'returns', 'metrics', 'validate']

subtasks.defaultBehavior: fullSync=false for manual refresh button clicks

subtasks.title: Integrate with Refresh Button
subtasks.description: Update refresh button to trigger incremental metrics pipeline
changes: After existing refresh calls, add:
authenticatedPost('/api/metrics/calculate', { userId, fullSync: false })
This triggers incremental metrics update from last date

subtasks.title: Integrate with New Connection Flow
subtasks.description: Trigger full historical sync when new SnapTrade connection is created
changes: After new connection is detected/created, call:
authenticatedPost('/api/metrics/calculate', { userId, accountId, fullSync: true })
This triggers full historical metrics pipeline for new connection
subtasks.reference: Settings.jsx already calls sync with fullSync: true for new connections

subtasks.title: Unit Tests
subtasks.description: Write unit tests for each calculation function

subtasks.title: Integration Tests
subtasks.description: Test end-to-end pipeline
testCases: Test full pipeline with sample data

subtasks.title: Update Documentation
subtasks.description: Update README and documentation

blockers: Step 7 (Price Enrichment) blocks all subsequent steps

collections.name: PriceHistory
collections.purpose: Store daily price data for all symbols

collections.name: PortfolioTimeseries
collections.purpose: Store daily portfolio valuations, returns, and equity indices

collections.name: Metrics
collections.purpose: Store calculated metrics for different periods

collections.name: ValidationResults
collections.purpose: Store validation results for audit trail

newConnection.trigger: When user creates new SnapTrade brokerage connection
newConnection.description: Pull ALL historical data from account creation to present
flow: 3. updatePriceData.js with fullSync=true (fetches all historical prices)
4. updatePortfolioTimeseries.js with fullSync=true (calculates all historical values)
newConnection.integration: Called from Settings.jsx or connectionsController.js after new connection

dailyRefresh.description: Incremental update from last date in DB to present
flow: 3. updatePriceData.js with fullSync=false (fetches only missing prices)
4. updatePortfolioTimeseries.js with fullSync=false (calculates only new dates)
5. calculateMetrics.js with fullSync=false (recalculates only if data changed)

manualRefresh.description: Incremental update from last date in DB to present

incrementalUpdateStrategy.updateActivitiesTable: Uses getLastActivityDate() helper - if date exists, fetch from that date; otherwise fetch all
incrementalUpdateStrategy.updateEquitiesWeightTable: Processes all activities in AccountActivities - automatically handles new activities
incrementalUpdateStrategy.updatePriceData: Query PriceHistory for last price date per symbol, only fetch missing dates
incrementalUpdateStrategy.updatePortfolioTimeseries: Query PortfolioTimeseries for last date per account, only process new dates
incrementalUpdateStrategy.calculateMetrics: Check if PortfolioTimeseries has new data since last Metrics calculation, only recalculate if changed

notes: Yahoo Finance API (yahoo-finance2) is already installed and tested
All formulas are documented in Metrics.md
Incremental updates are implemented to avoid full recalculation
Monitor API rate limits for Yahoo Finance (2000 requests/hour)
All data is stored in MongoDB collections with proper indexes
Calculation functions are organized into helper modules for maintainability
Models follow existing project structure in quantDashBoard/server/src/models/
updateActivitiesTable.js already supports incremental updates via getLastActivityDate()
All new scripts must support fullSync parameter for full vs incremental mode
